title: Stone of All Time
description:
A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.

A plaque reads:
[gold][b]Stone of All Time[/b][/gold].

Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this [blue]Stone[/blue] and that it has never moved from this spot.

options.title: Drink and Lift
options.description: Lose [red][a random potion from your inventory][/red]. Gain [blue]10[/blue] Max HP.
options.requires: At least one potion in inventory

options.title: Push
options.requires: At least one Attack card in deck

conditions: All players must have at least one potion
notes: Both options present flavor text that suggests nothing actually happens—a reference to a famous scene from Earthbound. The LIFT option consumes a randomly selected potion from your inventory and increases your Max HP. The PUSH option deals damage and allows you to enchant one Attack card with [purple]Vigorous[/purple], which increases damage and grants [green]Block[/green] on attacks.
